query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN chrStatus = 'LISTED' THEN 1 END) as listed, COUNT(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as with_listing_date FROM properfyProperties WHERE companyId = 'company_1766331506068';
